tasks.label: Flash via SSH Rockchip
tasks.command: BUILD_DIR="${command:cmake.buildDirectory}"; cmake --build "$BUILD_DIR" && scp "$BUILD_DIR"/*.uf2 rock@100.115.224.114:~/firmware.uf2 && ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 'PICO_PORT=$(ls /dev/serial/by-id/usb-Raspberry_Pi_Pico* 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); if [ -n "$PICO_PORT" ]; then echo "Found at $PICO_PORT"; REAL_PORT=$(readlink -f "$PICO_PORT"); echo "Clearing sessions on $REAL_PORT..."; sudo fuser -k "$REAL_PORT" >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; sudo picotool load -f firmware.uf2'
tasks.detail: Builds locally, copies to Rockchip, and flashes via picotool (auto-reboots).

tasks.label: Monitor via SSH Rockchip
tasks.command: ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 'echo "Waiting for Pico..."; for i in {1..10}; do PICO_PORT=$(ls /dev/serial/by-id/usb-Raspberry_Pi_Pico* 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); if [ -n "$PICO_PORT" ]; then echo "Found at $PICO_PORT"; REAL_PORT=$(readlink -f "$PICO_PORT"); echo "Clearing sessions on $REAL_PORT..."; sudo fuser -k "$REAL_PORT" >/dev/null 2>&1; minicom -D "$PICO_PORT" -b 115200; exit 0; fi; sleep 1; done; echo "Pico not found!"; exit 1'
tasks.detail: Automatically finds the Raspberry Pi Pico and opens a remote serial monitor

tasks.label: Flash and Monitor via SSH Rockchip
